review.title: Review
review.description: Custom reviewed feedback submissions containing a text review message

message.description: The custom message typed by the client user

chat.title: Chat Message
chat.description: PASSCODE-protected chat message between Mr and Mrs

sender.description: The sender of the private message

text.description: Text content of the chat message

mediaData.description: Base64 data URI of the image or video if present

seen.description: Whether the message was seen by the recipient

delivered.description: Whether the message has been delivered to the recipient

profile.title: User Profile
profile.description: Synced display profiles (DP and Name) for Mr and Mrs

displayName.description: The selected display name of the user

displayPicture.description: The selected display picture (either an emoji or base64 image)

online.description: If user is currently active in the chatroom

lastSeen.description: The exact heartbeat timestamp of when the user was last active

typing.description: Whether the user is currently typing

reviews/{reviewId}.description: Collects standard notifications and user inputs

chats/{chatId}.description: Secures all chat exchanges between Mr and Mrs with credentials

profiles/{profileId}.description: Dynamic display names and avatar sync rules for Chat Room participants

typing_status/{userId}.description: Active typing states for real-time presence indicators
